---
title: "Rückenschutzformel"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-r-ckenschutzformel">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }

  const cls = document.querySelector('meta[name="slot-title-class"]')?.content;
  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");
  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



## Übliche Form

![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0010_sA_seit-MR_02.png){.glyph} *sꜣ* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/02_anx/0001_anx_01.png){.glyph} *ꜥnḫ* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0010_HA_02.png){.glyph} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/04_=f-nb/0001_=f-nb_01.png){.glyph} *ḥꜣ⸗f nb*


## Übersetzung

Aller Schutz (und) alles Leben ist hinter ihm.


## Schreibvarianten der Formel

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sꜣ ꜥnḫ ḥꜣ⸗f nb*</em>:</span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0001_sA-anx-HA=f-nb_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0010_sA-anx-HA=f-nb-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sꜣ ꜥnḫ ḥꜣ⸗f*</em>:</span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0020_sA-anx-HA=f_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0030_sA-anx-HA=f_02.png){.glyph}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sꜣ ꜥnḫ wꜣs ḥꜣ⸗f*</em>:</span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0040_sA-anx-wAs-HA=f_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0050_sA-anx-wAs-HA=f_NR-selten-Gr-oft_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(selten NR; Gr. oft)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sꜣ ꜥnḫ ḏd wꜣs ḥꜣ⸗f*</em>:</span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0060_sA-anx-Dd-wAs-HA=f_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sꜣ ꜥnḫ ḏd wꜣs snb ḥꜣ⸗f*</em>:</span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/formel-gesamt/0070_sA-anx-Dd-wAs-snb-HA=f_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup>


:::



## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sꜣ*</em>:</span><span class='tla-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/125600' class='tla-badge' title='TLA-Lemma 125600' aria-label='Lemma 125600 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae offnen'>TLA 125600</a></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0001_sA_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0010_sA_seit-MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0020_sA_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0030_sA_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0040_sA_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0050_sA_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/01_sA/0060_sA_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*ꜥnḫ*</em>:</span><span class='tla-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/38540' class='tla-badge' title='TLA-Lemma 38540' aria-label='Lemma 38540 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae offnen'>TLA 38540</a></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/02_anx/0001_anx_01.png){.glyph}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*ḥꜣ*</em>:</span><span class='tla-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/100130' class='tla-badge' title='TLA-Lemma 100130' aria-label='Lemma 100130 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae offnen'>TLA 100130</a></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0001_HA_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0010_HA_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0020_HA_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0030_HA_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0040_HA_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/07_Beischriften/04_Rueckenschutzformel/03_HA/0050_HA_Sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup>


:::



## Literatur

Hoffmann, Friedhelm 2021. Einige Beobachtungen zur Rückenschutzformel. In Ullmann, Martina, Gabriele Pieke, Friedhelm Hoffmann, and Christian Bayer (eds), Up and down the Nile: ägyptologische Studien für Regine Schulz, 187-204. Münster: Zaphon.



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
